NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-09-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN STIPULATION. REPORTING OF TERMS WAIVED BY PARTIES. SEE SCANNED STIPULATIONS IN CASES 611402, 611221, 611284. PER TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT BY STIPULATION IN CASE 610509 THE PARTIES AGREED NOT TO FILE THE WRITTEN STIPULATION UNTIL SUCH TIME AS THE TERMS THEREIN WERE BREACHED. ORAL TERMS OF THE STIPULATION IN CASE 610509 WERE PLACED ON THE COURT RECORD WITH JUDGE PRO TEM SUSAN LEW; D. CARTER, CLERK; MITCH LYONS, CSR. 6840.
